evidence_summary: [CH025_SC002] Purpose: To execute the primary action climax and resolve the political threat of the Zodangan leadership.

[CH025_SC002] Summary: A chaotic skirmish breaks out in the throne room between Carter, the Zodangan guards, and the arriving Tharks led by Tars Tarkas. In the heat of the battle, both Sab Than and Than Kosis are killed. The Tharks eventually secure the hal...
